versions.version_description: This specific tab is based off the studio recorded version.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Dmaj7: xx0222
D: xx0232
F#sus4: x24422
Bm: x24432
Em7: x22033
A7sus4: x0203x
A7: x0202x


[Intro] 
[ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]A7sus4[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]                [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want you to stay[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
'Til I'm in the grave[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em7[/ch]
'Til I rot away, dead and buried[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A7sus4[/ch]      [ch]A7[/ch]
'Til I'm in the casket you carry[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
If you go, I'm goin' too, uh[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
'Cause it was always you (Alright)[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em7[/ch]
And if I'm turnin' blue[/tab]

Please don't save me
[tab]                 [ch]A7sus4[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]
Nothin' left to lose without my baby[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]

[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
    Birds of a feather[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
We should stick together[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#sus4[/ch]
I know[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
I said I'd never think[/tab]

I wasn't better alone
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
    Can't change the weather[/tab]

Might not be forever
[tab]       [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
But if it's forever[/tab]

It's even better


[Pre-chorus 2]

[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
    And I don't know what I'm[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#sus4[/ch]
cryin' for[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]
I don't think I could love you more[/tab]
It might not be long, but, baby,
[tab][ch]A7sus4[/ch]
I[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A7[/ch]
I'll love you 'til the day that I[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
die[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
'Til the day that I die[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]
'Til the light leaves my eyes[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
'Til the day that I die[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]              [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want you to see, hmm[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
How you look to me, hmm[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
You wouldn't believe if I told ya[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
You would keep the compliments I[/tab]
throw ya
[tab]                      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
But you're so full of shit, uh[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
Tell me it's a bit, oh[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]
Say you don't see it, your mind's[/tab]
polluted
[tab]                [ch]A7sus4[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]

[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
    And I don't know what I'm[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#sus4[/ch]
cryin' for[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
I don't think I could love you more[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
Might not be long, but, baby, I[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  Don't wanna say goodbye[/tab]


[Pre-chorus 2]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Birds of a feather, we should stick[/tab]
together
[tab]      [ch]F#sus4[/ch]
I know ('Til the day that I die)[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
I said I'd never think I wasn't[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
better alone[/tab]

('Til the light leaves my eyes)

Can't change the weather, might not
be forever

 ('Til the day that I die)
[tab][ch]A7sus4[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch]
But if it's forever, it's even[/tab]
better

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]F#sus4[/ch]
    I knew you in another life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]Em7[/ch]
You had that same look in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
I love you, don't act so surprised[/tab]

[Outro] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]A7sus4[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch]
